subject: SGR 1806-20: Correction to GCN 33494
body:
Sandro Mereghetti (INAF, IASF Milano) communicates:

A mistake has been made in reporting the fluence of the SGR 1806-20 burst
in GCN 33494. The correct value is 4e-8 erg/cm2 (20-200 keV).

I apologize for the mistake.

Note also that, due to a technical problem (which has now been fixed),  the
IBAS Alert corresponding to this trigger was not distributed in real time.
